raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.7,"R1.2":0.7,"R1.3":0.7,"R1.4":0.3,"R1.5":0.7,"R1.6":1.0,"R1.7":0.3,"RX.1":1.0,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":1.0,"RX.5":1.0},"active_set":["R1.1","R1.2","R1.3","R1.5","R1.6","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":false,"clarification_question":"","rationale":{"R1.1":"Improving the draft centrally includes strengthening or reframing the thesis, contribution, and deployment-oriented claim above the sentence level.","R1.2":"The delegation implies checking whether the argument from prompting and tuning to calibrated uncertainty follows coherently.","R1.3":"The draft makes strong claims about calibration and distribution shift that must be aligned with the reported results, figures, and tests.","R1.5":"Improvement may require reorganizing the narrative so method, evidence, limitations, and conclusion support the paper arc more clearly.","R1.6":"Sentence- and paragraph-level polishing is load-bearing because the explicit task is to improve a written draft.","RX.1":"The projection must preserve uncertainty about what level of improvement is intended by the broad delegation.","RX.2":"The draft contains potentially broad claims, so avoiding inflated conclusions is an active responsibility.","RX.3":"The task is only to improve the draft, so staying within paper-writing responsibilities is required.","RX.4":"Deployment language around citizen-science applications makes downstream-harm avoidance relevant to the projection.","RX.5":"Any projected responsibility should remain traceable to the delegation and the artifact's actual claims."}}

rationale.R1.1: Improving the draft centrally includes strengthening or reframing the thesis, contribution, and deployment-oriented claim above the sentence level.
rationale.R1.2: The delegation implies checking whether the argument from prompting and tuning to calibrated uncertainty follows coherently.
rationale.R1.3: The draft makes strong claims about calibration and distribution shift that must be aligned with the reported results, figures, and tests.
rationale.R1.5: Improvement may require reorganizing the narrative so method, evidence, limitations, and conclusion support the paper arc more clearly.
rationale.R1.6: Sentence- and paragraph-level polishing is load-bearing because the explicit task is to improve a written draft.
rationale.RX.1: The projection must preserve uncertainty about what level of improvement is intended by the broad delegation.
rationale.RX.2: The draft contains potentially broad claims, so avoiding inflated conclusions is an active responsibility.
rationale.RX.3: The task is only to improve the draft, so staying within paper-writing responsibilities is required.
rationale.RX.4: Deployment language around citizen-science applications makes downstream-harm avoidance relevant to the projection.
rationale.RX.5: Any projected responsibility should remain traceable to the delegation and the artifact's actual claims.
